allow: Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep -E "^\(Error|error:|FAIL\)" | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep -E "ERROR:" | sed 's/.*ERROR: //' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep -B2 "TestingLibraryElementError\\|AssertionError\\|TypeError\\|is not a function" | head -40)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "Transform failed" | sed 's/.*components\\//components\\//' | sed 's/:.*//' | sort -u | head -40)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "ERROR:" | grep -o "components/[^:]*" | sort -u)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "ERROR:" | grep -o "components/[^:]*" | sort -u | wc -l)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "ERROR:" | grep -o "components/[^.]*\\.tsx" | sort -u)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "ERROR:" | grep -o "components/[^.]*\\.test\\.tsx" | sort -u)

Bash(npx tsc --noEmit --jsx react-jsx components/AccordionNavList.test.tsx components/AccordionNavListItem.test.tsx components/AvatarText.test.tsx components/BreadcrumbNav.test.tsx components/BreadcrumbNavListItem.test.tsx components/CheckList.test.tsx components/ClipboardCopyButton.test.tsx components/ColorPickerButton.test.tsx components/FiveFaceRatingPicker.test.tsx components/FiveFaceRatingPickerButton.test.tsx components/FiveFaceRatingView.test.tsx components/FiveStarRatingPicker.test.tsx components/FiveStarRatingPickerButton.test.tsx components/NetPromoterScorePickerButton.test.tsx components/PinInputDiv.test.tsx components/Progress.test.tsx components/RedAmberGreenPickerButton.test.tsx components/RedOrangeYellowGreenBluePickerButton.test.tsx components/ThemeSelect.test.tsx components/TreeNav.test.tsx 2>&1 | head -80)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep -A1 "FAIL.*>" | grep -v "^--$" | grep -v "FAIL" | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20)
Bash(grep -l "Found multiple elements" components/*.tsx 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; grep -c "bind:value" components/*.tsx 2>/dev/null | grep -v ":0$")
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep -A1 "FAIL.*>" | grep -v "^--$" | grep -v "FAIL" | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -15)
Bash(grep -l "ReferenceError.*visible" components/*.test.tsx 2>/dev/null; npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "visible is not defined" | grep -o "components/[^.]*" | sort -u)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "^.* FAIL " | sed 's/.*FAIL //' | sed 's/ *\\[.*//' | sort -u)
Bash(npx vitest run 2>&1 | grep "FAIL" | sed 's/.*FAIL //' | sed 's/ *>.*//' | sort -u)
Bash(npx vitest run components/Banner.test.tsx components/AlertDialog.test.tsx components/ClipboardCopyButton.test.tsx 2>&1 | tail -15)

Bash(npx vitest run components/AspectRatioContainer.test.tsx components/Avatar.test.tsx components/AvatarImage.test.tsx components/BreadcrumbNavList.test.tsx components/CalendarTableData.test.tsx components/DataFilterForm.test.tsx components/DataTableData.test.tsx components/Figure.test.tsx components/GanttTableData.test.tsx components/KanbanTable.test.tsx components/KanbanTableData.test.tsx components/MedicalRecordRedBox.test.tsx components/ScrollBar.test.tsx components/TabGroup.test.tsx components/Tour.test.tsx components/TourList.test.tsx components/TourListItem.test.tsx 2>&1 | tail -25)
Bash(npx vitest run components/AspectRatioContainer.test.tsx components/Editable.test.tsx 2>&1 | tail -50)
Bash(npx vitest run components/AspectRatioContainer.test.tsx components/Editable.test.tsx 2>&1 | tail -15)
Bash(npx vitest run components/AspectRatioContainer.test.tsx 2>&1 | grep -A5 "sets aspect")

Bash(for f in components/DropdownMenu.test.tsx components/KanbanTableCol.test.tsx components/GanttTableCol.test.tsx components/CalendarTableCol.test.tsx components/DataTableCol.test.tsx components/DataTable.test.tsx components/Form.test.tsx components/PaginationList.test.tsx components/SelectWithExtras.test.tsx components/Select.test.tsx components/ToolBar.test.tsx components/TaskBar.test.tsx components/TabBar.test.tsx components/RadioGroup.test.tsx components/Listbox.test.tsx components/MenuBar.test.tsx components/Menu.test.tsx components/ContextMenu.test.tsx components/CheckListItem.test.tsx; do sed -i '' '/^import React from "react";$/d' "$f" && echo "Fixed $f"; done)
